name: GH_IChunk
summary: Base interface for all Archive Chunks.

methods.name: AddMessage
methods.summary: Log a new message with the top-level archive. Messages are collected during read/write operations, and can be displayed to the user upon completion using GH_Archive.ShowMessageLog().

methods.name: Read(BinaryReader)
methods.summary: Called when an object is required to deserialize itself.

params.name: reader
params.doc: Reader object to be used for deserialization.

methods.name: Read(XmlNode)
methods.summary: Called when an object is required to deserialize itself.

params.name: node
params.doc: Node object to be used for deserialization.

methods.name: Write(BinaryWriter)
methods.summary: Called when an object is required to serialize itself.

params.name: writer
params.doc: Writer object to be used for serialization.

methods.name: Write(XmlWriter)
methods.summary: Called when an object is required to serialize itself.

params.name: writer
params.doc: Writer object to be used for serialization.

properties.name: Archive
properties.summary: Gets a pointer to the archive that owns the Root of the tree this chunk belongs to.

properties.name: ArchiveLocation
properties.summary: Gets a string representing the URI with which the archive is associated. The location may be a null string.

properties.name: ChunkCount
properties.summary: Gets the number of child chunks contained in this chunk. The set of all child chunks is referred to as a 'litter'.

properties.name: Chunks
properties.summary: Gets a pointer to the internal list of child chunks. Do not access this list unless you know what you are doing.

properties.name: Index
properties.summary: Gets the index of this chunk. The index is set by the owner of this chunk. Indices smaller than zero imply no index has been set. The combination of name+index is always unique among a set of chunks in the same litter.

properties.name: ItemCount
properties.summary: Gets the number of items contained in this chunk.

properties.name: Items
properties.summary: Gets a pointer to the internal list of items. Do not access this list unless you know what you are doing.

properties.name: Name
properties.summary: Gets the name of this chunk. The name is set by the owner of this chunk. Names must be at least 1 character long. The combination of name+index is always unique among a set of chunks in a single litter.
